stem: A scatterplot shows the growing season (in years after planting) and weight (in pounds) of plums produced by a plum tree. The data points are: (1, 0), (2, 12), (3, 25), (4, 36), (5, 50), (6, 65), (7, 78), (8, 90). What was the weight, to the nearest pound, of all plums produced by the tree during the 5th growing season after planting?
rationale: The correct answer is 50. According to the data, in the 5th growing season the tree produced 50 pounds of plums.
